lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Hello adventurer, here's some wise words.

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Happiness is inward and not outward. So it does not depend on what we have but on what we are!

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Some people grumble because roses have thorns. I'm thankful that thorns have roses!

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Well good day to you. Are you new to these parts?

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Well if you're looking for a good night out: Blurberry's cocktail bar is great!

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Hi. I've never seen so many humans in my life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've never seen so many gnomes!

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Not bad, a little worn out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe you should have a lie down.

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: With three kids to feed I've no time for naps!

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: It is but they're worth it.

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Hello traveller. Are you eating properly? You look tired.

lines.speaker: Gnome woman
lines.text: Here get this worm down you. It'll do you the world of good.
